_meta.description: Ottawa municipal tax rates and budget service breakdown percentages.
_meta.instructions: Update this file each year after Ottawa City Council adopts the final budget (typically December). Tax rates sourced from City of Ottawa / WOWA.ca. Service percentages sourced from the Ottawa Draft Budget Explorer at open.ottawa.ca. After updating, commit to GitHub — the receipt app fetches the latest version automatically.
_meta.updated_by: Manual update from Open Ottawa Draft Budget Explorer datasets

tax_rates._note: Municipal portion only — excludes education tax (~0.153%). Source: WOWA / City of Ottawa.

services._note: Percentages represent each service's share of the municipal tax levy. Derived from Ottawa Operating Budget summaries at open.ottawa.ca. Update annually after budget adoption.
services._how_to_update: 1. Go to https://open.ottawa.ca/pages/understanding-your-city-budget  2. Download the latest Operating Budget Summaries CSV.  3. Sum the net tax levy by service area.  4. Calculate each service as a % of total levy.  5. Update the pct fields below for the new year and bump last_updated in _meta.

2025.descEN: Bus & LRT operations, zero-emission buses, O-Train Lines 2 & 4, fare programs & transit safety.
2025.descFR: Exploitation des bus et du TLR, autobus zéro émission, lignes O-Train 2 et 4, programmes tarifaires et sécurité.

2025.descEN: $184.6M in road, water & sewer projects, resurfacing, bridges, sidewalks & cycling paths.
2025.descFR: 184,6 M$ en projets routiers, d'eau et d'égouts, resurfaçage, ponts, trottoirs et pistes cyclables.

2025.descEN: Community policing, emergency response, crime prevention & 25 new officers hired in 2025.
2025.descFR: Police communautaire, intervention d'urgence, prévention du crime et 25 nouveaux agents en 2025.

2025.descEN: Housing supports, shelters, child care, long-term care & homelessness prevention programs.
2025.descFR: Aide au logement, refuges, garde d'enfants, soins de longue durée et programmes de prévention de l'itinérance.

2025.descEN: 23 new paramedics, 22 new firefighters, new vehicles & improved emergency technology.
2025.descFR: 23 nouveaux paramédics, 22 nouveaux pompiers, nouveaux véhicules et technologie d'urgence améliorée.

2025.descEN: Community centres, sports facilities, parks maintenance & Ottawa Public Library services.
2025.descFR: Centres communautaires, installations sportives, entretien des parcs et services de la Bibliothèque publique d'Ottawa.

2025.descEN: Garbage & recycling, Ottawa Public Health, immunizations & clean water programs.
2025.descFR: Collecte des ordures et recyclage, Santé publique Ottawa, vaccinations et programmes d'eau potable.
